format: ALEX/JORDAN dialogue, plain text, no stage directions
notes: Origin episode covers MoCo birthplace, Egyptian-immigrant parents, Muslim self-identification, Jesuit HS (school not on record), 1991-1999 'Veteran' gap (named on-air as the single most important open question), 1999 MCPD academy graduation as first Muslim officer of MCPD. Honest about thinness of pre-1999 footprint — explicitly tells listener that asymmetric depth between Hidayat and Luedtke series is a feature of the source material, not a failure of the show.
